● READY UP
TeamMate_Samgg that was a good round 😄
xX_ProGamer99_Xx you're really good!! 🔥 i'm making a pro squad, we need 1 more. what school do you go to? join our discord + i'll send u free skins 🎁
👆 Something's off — tap the red flag
🚩 Red flag spotted
Nice catch. A stranger asking what school you go to — and offering free stuff to move you to another app. That's the flag. Now… what do you do?

Perfect run!

Aiko just grew a little. You earned 3 stars and your first Red Flag Journal entry.

📖
Red Flag Journal +1"A stranger asked where I go to school." — Never share personal info with people you meet in games.

Next time… you teach me 😏

Once you've mastered a topic, Aiko hands it over — you catch the mistake and teach Aiko. That's when it really sticks.

Next mission unlockedDiscord — "The friend request from a stranger."
The companion opens

You don't open a menu.
You open a friend.

Aiko greets the child by name and takes them into a world of missions they play together. Companion-first, always.

Aiko reacts & teachesShow, don't lecture

Tease & flipThe child teaches back
Design law: stars measure mastery, not completion. No forced retry, no loot boxes, no FOMO — mastery is never for sale.
